title: HTI Cosy Cuddles Animal Plush Cushion | Soft Weighted Plush Toy Pillow for Kids & Adults | Cute Stuffed Animal Cushion for Anxiety ADHD Autism Stress Relief | Crocodile, Pug, Unicorn | 18M+ (Unicorn)
features: SOFT & HUGGABLE ANIMAL PLUSH CUSHION – The Cosy Cuddles Animal Plush Cushion is the perfect snuggle buddy for kids and adults alike. Designed with soft plush fabric and a cuddly cushion style, it provides comfort, warmth, and relaxation. Available in adorable Crocodile, Pug, and Unicorn styles, these plush companions bring cuteness and comfort to any bedroom, sofa, or playroom.

SLIGHTLY WEIGHTED FOR CALMING COMFORT – Each Cosy Cuddles cushion is lightly weighted, making it ideal for easing stress, anxiety, ADHD, and autism. The gentle weight helps provide a calming effect, supporting relaxation and focus while offering a soft, safe cuddle experience. Perfect for children and adults who love the soothing benefits of weighted plush toys.

PERFECT SIZE FOR KIDS & ADULTS TO CUDDLE – Measuring H15cm x W20cm x D45cm, these plush animal cushions are lightweight and easy to carry while being large enough to snuggle comfortably. The perfect size for little hands and big hugs, they can be used as bedtime cuddle buddies, nap-time pillows, or everyday comfort companions.

FUN DESIGNS TO COLLECT & GIFT – With 3 adorable animal characters to choose from – Crocodile, Pug, and Unicorn – the Cosy Cuddles range is perfect for gifting and collecting. Each cushion has its own charm and personality, making them great presents for birthdays, Christmas, or special occasions for children, teens, and adults.

SAFE, DURABLE & SUITABLE FOR ALL AGES 18M+ – Crafted from high-quality, child-friendly materials, these plush cushions are safe, durable, and long-lasting. Designed for anyone aged 18 months and up, they make a wonderful comfort toy for toddlers while being equally loved by older children and adults in need of a soft, stress-relieving cuddle.
